nodes.title: Claude Code hooks must use --permission-mode bypassPermissions for sub-agents
nodes.summary: Hooks run without a TTY — any permission prompt hangs indefinitely. Always pass --permission-mode bypassPermissions when invoking sub-agents from Stop/PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks. Also pass --no-session-persistence to prevent recursive Stop hook firing.

nodes.title: Claude Code background agents must pass --no-session-persistence to avoid recursive Stop hooks
nodes.summary: Omitting --no-session-persistence from a claude subprocess launched in a Stop hook causes the saved session to trigger another Stop hook event — creating an infinite loop of background processes.
